summary: Plan-mode live PR inventory classification only. The shard has no shared canonical, all five hydrated PRs are open and security_sensitive=false, and no close/merge/fix action is safe or allowed from the provided evidence.

actions.reason: Open draft maintainer PR with useful focused code; not a duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or closable item in this inventory shard.
Open draft maintainer PR with its own focused implementation path; no hydrated canonical replacement or closure basis is present.
Useful contributor documentation PR awaiting maintainer review; merge is blocked by job policy and closure would lose a valid contribution.
Open draft maintainer PR with a focused doctor/tool-allowlist change; no closure or shared-canonical decision is supported by the hydrated artifact.
Open maintainer-owned test PR with useful focused coverage but failing broader checks and waiting-on-author status; classify independently rather than close or escalate.
